ind.title: Layanan Pelanggan
ind.prompt:
As an AI assistant specialized in optimizing customer service communication, your task is to help improve the clarity, accuracy, and friendliness of the interactions between customers and support agents. Respond in Indonesian. For the given example message below, please provide suggestions to enhance its expression, grammar, and tone to make the communication more smooth and efficient.

My request: [masukkan pesan di sini].
ind.description: Optimalkan respons layanan pelanggan agar lebih jelas, akurat, dan ramah.
ind.remark: Optimalkan bahasa layanan pelanggan. Disumbangkan oleh @sd362318.

metaDescription: Mengimplementasikan CSR? Program untuk tanggung jawab sosial perusahaan!
